title: Highly-ionized gas in lensed z = 6.027 Little Red Dot seen through [OIII] 88$μ$m with ALMA
summary: Determining the physical properties of galaxies during the first billion years after the big bang is key to understanding both early galaxy evolution and how galaxies contributed to the epoch of reionization. We present deep ALMA observations of the redshifted [OIII] 88um line for the gravitationally lensed ($μ= 11.4\pm1.9$) galaxy A383-5.1 (z=6.027) that has previously been detected in [CII] 158um. Recent James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) imaging identified this sub-L* galaxy as a ''Little Red Dot'' (LRD). With a line luminosity of $L_{\rm [OIII]} = (1.29\pm0.24)\times10^8$ L$_\odot$ (corrected for lensing magnification) A383-5.1 is one of the faintest galaxies with combined [CII] and [OIII] detections. The ALMA data reveal no dust continuum emission, consistent with previous observations. The high line luminosity ratio of [OIII]/[CII] $\sim 14\pm5$ is consistent with A383-5.1 being low-metallicity and dust-poor. The non-detection of dust continuum in bands 6 and 8 is consistent with the high [OIII]/[CII] ratio and suggests a presence of a strong ultraviolet radiation field, which would be less affect by dust attenuation, implying that galaxies of this type could contribute significantly to the ionization of the intergalactic medium. The presence of strong ionizing field could provide an important piece of information for understanding the nature of LRDs and their role in cosmic reionization.

AI.tldr: ALMA观测发现高红移（z=6.027）引力透镜星系A383-5.1具有异常高的[OIII]/[CII]线光度比（~14），表明其为低金属丰度、贫尘埃星系，可能拥有强紫外辐射场，对宇宙再电离有重要贡献。
AI.motivation: 研究大爆炸后第一个十亿年内星系的物理性质，对于理解早期星系演化以及星系在宇宙再电离时期的作用至关重要。A383-5.1星系作为"小红点"（LRD）类星系，其特性可能为理解这类星系在再电离过程中的作用提供关键信息。
AI.method: 使用ALMA对引力透镜星系A383-5.1进行深度观测，测量其红移后的[OIII] 88微米谱线，结合先前已有的[CII] 158微米探测数据。通过分析[OIII]/[CII]线光度比、尘埃连续谱缺失等特征，推断星系的物理性质。
AI.result: 测得[OIII]线光度为(1.29±0.24)×10^8 L⊙（经引力透镜放大校正），[OIII]/[CII]线光度比高达~14±5，是已知[OIII]和[CII]同时探测到的最暗星系之一。ALMA波段6和8均未探测到尘埃连续谱发射。
AI.conclusion: 高[OIII]/[CII]比和尘埃连续谱缺失表明A383-5.1是低金属丰度、贫尘埃星系，可能存在强紫外辐射场。这类星系可能对星系际介质的电离有重要贡献，为理解"小红点"星系的性质及其在宇宙再电离中的作用提供了重要线索。

title: Line-of-sight shear in SLACS strong lenses II: validation tests with an extended sample
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures, companion paper to 2501.16292v2, prepared for submission to the Open Journal of Astrophysics
summary: Strong gravitational lensing images are subject to shape distortions due to inhomogeneities along the line of sight. The leading order shape distortion is shear, which, if measurable, will be a complementary cosmological probe to traditional cosmic shear. In Hogg et al. (2025a), we modelled 23 of the SLACS strong lenses, studying the line-of-sight (LOS) shear under a variety of shear and mass model parametrisations. In this work, we model 27 additional lenses, extending our sample of LOS shear constraints to 45 in total. We find a mean shear magnitude of $0.11\pm 0.024$, showing that a significant fraction of the lenses modelled in this work possess LOS shears with unexpectedly large magnitudes, $|γ_{\rm LOS}| > 0.1$, even when an octupolar distortion is included in the lens mass. We further investigate if factors such as lens and source redshift, filter and PSF, or flux and signal-to-noise ratio in the lensed arcs correlate with shear. We find that none of these features play a statistically significant role in the production of unusually large shear magnitudes.

AI.tldr: 该研究扩展了强引力透镜样本，测量了视线方向剪切，发现平均剪切幅度为0.11±0.024，许多透镜具有意外大的剪切幅度（|γ_LOS| > 0.1），且这些大剪切幅度与多种观测特征无显著相关性。
AI.motivation: 强引力透镜图像受到视线方向不均匀性的形状扭曲影响，其中剪切是主要扭曲形式。测量这种视线剪切可以作为传统宇宙剪切的补充宇宙学探针，但需要更多样本验证其统计特性。
AI.method: 扩展了先前研究中的23个SLACS强透镜样本，新增27个透镜，总共建模45个强透镜系统。在包含八极扭曲的透镜质量模型下，测量视线方向剪切幅度，并分析剪切与透镜/源红移、滤波器、PSF、通量、信噪比等观测特征的相关性。
AI.result: 平均剪切幅度为0.11±0.024，表明大量透镜具有意外大的视线剪切幅度（|γ_LOS| > 0.1）。统计分析显示，这些大剪切幅度与透镜/源红移、滤波器、PSF、通量、信噪比等观测特征均无统计学显著相关性。
AI.conclusion: 视线剪切幅度普遍较大且与观测特征无关，表明强引力透镜中的大剪切幅度可能是普遍现象，这为视线剪切作为宇宙学探针提供了重要约束，但需要进一步研究其物理起源。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜图像会因视线方向上的不均匀性而产生形状畸变。主导阶的形状畸变是剪切，如果可测量，它将成为传统宇宙剪切的补充宇宙学探针。在Hogg等人（2025a）中，我们模拟了23个SLACS强透镜，研究了在不同剪切和质量模型参数化下的视线剪切。在本工作中，我们模拟了另外27个透镜，将视线剪切约束样本扩展到总共45个。我们发现平均剪切幅度为$0.11\pm 0.024$，表明本工作模拟的透镜中有相当一部分具有意外大的视线剪切幅度，$|γ_{\rm LOS}| > 0.1$，即使在透镜质量中包含八极畸变时也是如此。我们进一步研究了透镜和源红移、滤光片和点扩散函数、以及透镜弧中的通量和信噪比等因素是否与剪切相关。我们发现这些特征在产生异常大的剪切幅度方面均未起到统计显著的作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：视线剪切幅度普遍较大且与观测特征无关，表明强引力透镜中的大剪切幅度可能是普遍现象，这为视线剪切作为宇宙学探针提供了重要约束，但需要进一步研究其物理起源。

title: Resolving the molecular gas emission of the z~2.5-2.8 starburst galaxies SPT0125-47 and SPT 2134-50
summary: The comoving cosmic star formation rate density peaks at z~2-3, with dusty star-forming galaxies being significant contributors to this peak. These galaxies are characterized by their high star formation rates and substantial infrared luminosities. The formation mechanisms remain an open question for these galaxies, particularly with respect to how such intense levels of star formation are triggered and maintained. We aim to resolve CO(3-2) emission toward two strongly lensed galaxies, SPT0125-47 and SPT2134-50, at z~2.5-2.8 to determine their morphology and physical properties. We used high-resolution ALMA band 3 observations of CO(3-2) emission toward both sources to investigate their properties. We performed parametric and nonparametric lens modeling using the publicly available lens modeling software PyAutoLens. We divided the CO(3-2) emission line into two bins corresponding to the red and blue portions of the emission line and nonparametrically modeled the source plane emission for both bins. We performed a basic analysis of the morphology and kinematics in the source plane using nonparametric lens modeling of the red and blue bins. We found tentative evidence of a velocity gradient across both sources and no evidence of any clumpy structure, companions, or ongoing mergers. The previously calculated high star formation rates and low depletion times of both SPT0125-47 and SPT2134-50 suggest that these galaxies are undergoing a dramatic phase in their evolution. Given the lack of evidence of ongoing interactions or mergers in our source plane models, we suggest that the intense star formation was triggered by a recent interaction and/or merger. We also consider the possibility that these galaxies might be in the process of settling into disks.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA高分辨率观测两个强引力透镜星系SPT0125-47和SPT2134-50的CO(3-2)发射线，通过透镜建模分析其形态和运动学特征，发现可能存在速度梯度但无合并迹象，推测其剧烈恒星形成可能由近期相互作用触发。
AI.motivation: 研究z~2-3时期宇宙恒星形成率密度峰值的主要贡献者——尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成星系，探究其剧烈恒星形成的触发和维持机制，特别是通过分析强引力透镜星系来揭示其形态和物理性质。
AI.method: 使用ALMA波段3对两个红移z~2.5-2.8的强引力透镜星系SPT0125-47和SPT2134-50进行高分辨率CO(3-2)发射线观测；采用公开透镜建模软件PyAutoLens进行参数化和非参数化透镜建模；将CO(3-2)发射线分为红移和蓝移两个部分，分别对源平面发射进行非参数化建模；基于红蓝分箱的非参数化透镜建模结果，对源平面形态和运动学进行基本分析。
AI.result: 在两个源中都发现了速度梯度的初步证据；未发现任何团块结构、伴星系或正在进行的合并迹象；先前计算的高恒星形成率和低耗尽时间表明这些星系正处于演化的剧烈阶段。
AI.conclusion: 鉴于源平面模型中缺乏正在进行的相互作用或合并的证据，推测剧烈的恒星形成是由最近的相互作用和/或合并触发的；同时考虑这些星系可能正在沉降成盘状结构的可能性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 共动宇宙恒星形成率密度在红移z~2-3处达到峰值，其中尘埃恒星形成星系是这一峰值的重要贡献者。这些星系以其高恒星形成率和巨大的红外光度为特征。对于这些星系，其形成机制仍是一个未解之谜，特别是如此强烈的恒星形成如何被触发和维持。我们旨在解析两个强透镜星系SPT0125-47和SPT2134-50（红移z~2.5-2.8）的CO(3-2)发射，以确定它们的形态和物理性质。我们利用高分辨率ALMA波段3观测了这两个源的CO(3-2)发射，以研究其性质。我们使用公开的透镜建模软件PyAutoLens进行了参数化和非参数化透镜建模。我们将CO(3-2)发射线划分为两个区间，分别对应发射线的红端和蓝端，并对这两个区间进行了非参数化源平面发射建模。通过对红端和蓝端的非参数化透镜建模，我们对源平面的形态和运动学进行了基本分析。我们发现了两个源存在速度梯度的初步证据，但未发现任何团块结构、伴星系或正在进行的并合迹象。先前计算出的SPT0125-47和SPT2134-50的高恒星形成率和低消耗时间表明，这些星系正经历其演化中的一个剧烈阶段。鉴于源平面模型中缺乏正在进行的相互作用或并合的证据，我们认为强烈的恒星形成是由最近的相互作用和/或并合触发的。我们也考虑了这些星系可能正在沉降为盘状结构的可能性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：鉴于源平面模型中缺乏正在进行的相互作用或并合的证据，推测剧烈的恒星形成是由最近的相互作用和/或并合触发的；同时考虑这些星系可能正在沉降成盘状结构的可能性。

title: The DREAMS Project: Disentangling the Impact of Halo-to-Halo Variance and Baryonic Feedback on Milky Way Dark Matter Speed Distributions
comment: 26 pages, 7 figures, 3 appendices, 7 additional figures. See also arxiv.2512.00148 and arXiv:2512.02095
summary: Direct detection experiments require information about the local dark matter speed distribution to produce constraints on dark matter candidates, or infer their properties in the event of a discovery. In this paper, we analyze how the uncertainty in the dark matter speed distribution near the Sun is affected by baryonic feedback, halo-to-halo variance, and halo mass. To do so, we harness the statistical power of the new DREAMS Cold Dark Matter simulation suite, which is comprised of 1024 zoom-in Milky Way-mass halos with varied initial conditions as well as cosmological and astrophysical parameters. Applying a normalizing flows emulator to these simulations, we find that the uncertainty in the local DM speed distribution is dominated by halo-to-halo variance and, to a lesser extent, uncertainty in host halo mass. Uncertainties in supernova and black hole feedback (from the IllustrisTNG model in this case) are negligible in comparison. Using the DREAMS suite, we present a state-of-the-art prediction for the DM speed distribution in the Milky Way. Although the Standard Halo Model is contained within the uncertainty of this prediction, individual galaxies may have distributions that differ from it. Lastly, we apply our DREAMS results to the XENON1T experiment and demonstrate that the astrophysical uncertainties are comparable to the experimental ones, solidifying previous results in the literature obtained with a smaller sample of simulated Milky Way-mass halos.

AI.tldr: 利用DREAMS模拟套件分析暗物质速度分布不确定性，发现晕间方差是主要来源，反馈机制影响可忽略，天体物理不确定性已与实验误差相当。
AI.motivation: 直接探测实验需要了解本地暗物质速度分布来约束暗物质候选者或在发现时推断其性质。本文旨在分析暗物质速度分布的不确定性来源，特别是重子反馈、晕间方差和晕质量的影响。
AI.method: 使用包含1024个银河系质量晕的DREAMS冷暗物质模拟套件，这些模拟具有变化的初始条件以及宇宙学和天体物理参数。应用归一化流模拟器分析这些模拟数据。
AI.result: 发现本地暗物质速度分布的不确定性主要由晕间方差主导，其次是宿主晕质量的不确定性。超新星和黑洞反馈的不确定性相比之下可忽略。标准晕模型包含在此预测的不确定性范围内，但个别星系可能有不同分布。应用于XENON1T实验显示天体物理不确定性已与实验误差相当。
AI.conclusion: 晕间方差是暗物质速度分布不确定性的主要来源，反馈机制影响很小。天体物理不确定性现在已与直接探测实验的误差相当，这证实了先前基于较小模拟样本的研究结果。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 直接探测实验需要关于局部暗物质速度分布的信息，以对暗物质候选者产生约束，或在发现时推断其性质。本文分析了重子反馈、晕间方差和晕质量如何影响太阳附近暗物质速度分布的不确定性。为此，我们利用了新的DREAMS冷暗物质模拟套件的统计能力，该套件包含1024个具有不同初始条件以及宇宙学和天体物理参数的银河系质量晕的放大模拟。通过将归一化流仿真器应用于这些模拟，我们发现局部暗物质速度分布的不确定性主要由晕间方差主导，其次是宿主晕质量的不确定性。相比之下，超新星和黑洞反馈（此处来自IllustrisTNG模型）的不确定性可以忽略。利用DREAMS套件，我们提出了银河系暗物质速度分布的最新预测。尽管标准晕模型包含在此预测的不确定性范围内，但个别星系的分布可能与之不同。最后，我们将DREAMS结果应用于XENON1T实验，并证明天体物理不确定性与实验不确定性相当，这巩固了先前基于较小银河系质量晕模拟样本的文献结果。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：晕间方差是暗物质速度分布不确定性的主要来源，反馈机制影响很小。天体物理不确定性现在已与直接探测实验的误差相当，这证实了先前基于较小模拟样本的研究结果。

The images are made from the i , r , g i,r,g Sloan broadband filters. Each image shows a 70 × 70 × 15 70\times 70\times 15 kpc 3 volume. The top panels show face-on images and the bottom panels show edge-on images. The DREAMS box number is labeled in the upper-right corner of each top panel. The leftmost image is a galaxy with M ⋆ M_{{\star}} and M LSR M_{{LSR}} less than that of the MW, the middle-left image is a galaxy with M ⋆ M_{{\star}} within the uncertainty of the MW but not M LSR M_{{LSR}} , the middle-right image is a galaxy with M LSR M_{{LSR}} witin the MW uncertainty but not M ⋆ M_{{\star}} , and the rightmost image shows a galaxy with M ⋆ M_{{\star}} and M LSR M_{{LSR}} within the uncertainty of our Galaxy. Galaxies such as the rightmost one are what we use for the analysis in Figure 2 .

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Median local DM speed distribution, and 16th–84th percentile band, for the emulated DREAMS dataset with Varied (dark blue) and Fixed (light blue) baryonic feedback parameters. These distributions are local to the solar radius at 8.3 kpc, and this follows for all other plots shown in this work. For the Fixed dataset, the parameters are set to their TNG fiducial values. The baryonic feedback parameters are marginalized over for the Varied band, while the halo mass is marginalized over for both Varied and Fixed. For each case, we restrict to systems with 10.60 ≤ log ⁡ M ⋆ / M ⊙ ≤ 10.78 10.60\leq\log M_{{\star}}/{M}_{\odot}\leq 10.78 and 10.975 ≤ log ⁡ M LSR / M ⊙ ≤ 11.085 10.975\leq\log M_{{LSR}}/{M}_{\odot}\leq 11.085 , consistent with observations for our Galaxy ( Bland_Hawthorn_2016 ) . For context, the dashed-gray line denotes v LSR = 238 ​ km ​ s − 1 v_{LSR}=238\ {km\ s}^{-1} , while the dashed-black line denotes the Standard Halo Model (SHM). The results for Fixed and Varied baryonic physics are consistent with each other, suggesting that baryonic feedback uncertainty is subdominant to halo-to-halo variance and halo mass uncertainty (see also Figure B2 ). Additionally, the SHM falls within the ensemble of distributions found in the emulated datasets, suggesting that it is a good proxy even if it may not exactly reproduce individual galaxy distributions.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：对于具有变化（深蓝色）和固定（浅蓝色）重子反馈参数的仿真DREAMS数据集，局部暗物质速度分布的中位数及第16-84百分位带。这些分布位于太阳半径8.3 kpc处，这适用于本文所有其他图。对于固定数据集，参数设置为其TNG基准值。变化带对重子反馈参数进行了边缘化，而固定和变化带都对晕质量进行了边缘化。每种情况下，我们限制系统满足10.60 ≤ log M⋆/M⊙ ≤ 10.78和10.975 ≤ log MLSR/M⊙ ≤ 11.085，这与我们银河系的观测一致（Bland_Hawthorn_2016）。作为参考，灰色虚线表示vLSR = 238 km s⁻¹，黑色虚线表示标准晕模型（SHM）。固定和变化重子物理的结果相互一致，表明重子反馈不确定性次于晕间方差和晕质量不确定性（另见图B2）。此外，SHM落在仿真数据集的分布集合内，表明即使它可能无法精确再现单个星系分布，也是一个良好的近似。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Median DM speed distributions (top panel) and 16th–84th percentile range (bottom panel) for 400 different halo masses, fixing baryonic feedback parameters to their TNG fiducial values. The distributions are colored by halo mass from log ⁡ M halo / M ⊙ = 11.6 \log M_{{halo}}/{M}_{\odot}=11.6 (Min; dark purple) to 12.2 12.2 (Max; orange). The black line corresponds to the TNG fiducial values and log ⁡ M halo / M ⊙ = 12 \log M_{{halo}}/{M}_{\odot}=12 . As halo mass increases, the potential well deepens, and the median speed distribution widens and peaks at higher values. Similarly, the 16–84 th percentile range (at a given speed) grows at larger halo masses, especially above ∼ 400 ​ km ​ s − 1 \sim 400\ {km\ s}^{-1} .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对于400个不同晕质量，固定重子反馈参数为其TNG基准值时的暗物质速度分布中位数（上面板）和第16-84百分位范围（下面板）。分布按晕质量从log Mhalo/M⊙ = 11.6（最小值；深紫色）到12.2（最大值；橙色）着色。黑线对应TNG基准值和log Mhalo/M⊙ = 12。随着晕质量增加，势阱加深，中位数速度分布变宽并在更高值处达到峰值。类似地，在较大晕质量下，第16-84百分位范围（在给定速度处）增大，尤其是在约400 km s⁻¹以上。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Median DM speed distributions (top panel) and 16th–84th percentile range (bottom panel) over 100 emulated samples each at 400 values of the supernovae parameters. In the left panel e widebar w \widebar{e}_{w} is varied from 0.9 (dark blue) to 14.4 (light green). In the right panel κ w \kappa_{w} is varied from 3.7 (light purple) to 14.8 (cyan). The black line shown uses the TNG fiducial values and log ⁡ M halo / M ⊙ = 12 \log M_{{halo}}/{M}_{\odot}=12 and is the same as that in Figure 3 . As e widebar w \widebar{e}_{w} increases, the speed distributions peak at lower values. The right panel shows a similar result for κ w \kappa_{w} . When these two supernova parameters increase in value, the galaxy’s stellar mass decreases, which makes a shallower potential well, corresponding to lower DM speeds.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在400个超新星参数值下，各100个仿真样本的暗物质速度分布中位数（上面板）和第16-84百分位范围（下面板）。左面板中，ēw从0.9（深蓝色）变化到14.4（浅绿色）。右面板中，κw从3.7（浅紫色）变化到14.8（青色）。显示的黑线使用TNG基准值和log Mhalo/M⊙ = 12，与图3相同。随着ēw增加，速度分布在较低值处达到峰值。右面板显示κw的类似结果。当这两个超新星参数值增加时，星系的恒星质量减小，导致势阱变浅，对应较低的暗物质速度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: DM speed distributions and 16th–84th ranges compared between DREAMS and TNG50. The top panels show folsom2025darkmattervelocitydistributions TNG50-1 results unscaled (left panel) and rescaled (right panel) alongside those of a new emulated DREAMS dataset where the number of galaxies, halo masses, stellar masses, and baryonic physics are matched exactly to the TNG50-1 galaxies (see discussion in Section 4.1.1 ). The bottom panels show the equivalent results for TNG50-2 galaxies, excluding any with log ⁡ M halo / M ⊙ > 12.2 \log M_{{halo}}/{M}_{\odot}>12.2 because DREAMS does not have halo masses this large and cannot emulate them reliably. For the rescaled galaxies, TNG50-1 has a smaller uncertainty band compared to DREAMS and TNG50-2 has a larger uncertainty band compared to DREAMS. The rescaling procedure rescales DM positions and velocities so the mass enclosed at the solar circle matches the mass enclosed for our MW.

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Speed distribution for FIRE-2 results from Staudt_2024 (including their one standard deviation uncertainty band, which includes uncertainty propagated from the MW circular velocity and the root mean square of the difference between their model and their simulation data) compared with DREAMS results when matching the circular velocities between the two suites. The dark blue emulated DREAMS curve includes 10 5 10^{5} samples and shows the median speed distribution and 16th–84th band. The FIRE-2 result is contained within the uncertainty of the DREAMS result and peaks at higher speeds, hinting at some difference due to e.g., resolution, sub-grid physics, or sample size. The DREAMS dataset corresponds to log ⁡ M halo / M ⊙ ∈ [ 12 , 12.2 ] \log M_{{halo}}/{M}_{\odot}\in[12,12.2] and 10.60 ≤ log ⁡ M ⋆ / M ⊙ ≤ 10.78 10.60\leq\log M_{{\star}}/{M}_{\odot}\leq 10.78 and 10.972 ≤ log ⁡ M LSR / M ⊙ ≤ 11.027 10.972\leq\log M_{{LSR}}/{M}_{\odot}\leq 11.027 . The SHM is shown in dashed black and v LSR v_{LSR} is denoted by the gray-dashed line. The FIRE-2 results falls within the DREAMS band, but the spread of the latter is much larger.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：来自Staudt_2024的FIRE-2结果的速度分布（包括其一个标准差不确定性带，该带包含从银河系圆周速度传播的不确定性以及其模型与模拟数据之间差异的均方根），与DREAMS结果在匹配两个套件圆周速度时的比较。深蓝色仿真DREAMS曲线包含10⁵个样本，显示中位数速度分布及第16-84百分位带。FIRE-2结果包含在DREAMS结果的不确定性内，并在更高速度处达到峰值，暗示由于分辨率、子网格物理或样本量等因素存在一些差异。DREAMS数据集对应log Mhalo/M⊙ ∈ [12, 12.2]和10.60 ≤ log M⋆/M⊙ ≤ 10.78以及10.972 ≤ log MLSR/M⊙ ≤ 11.027。SHM以黑色虚线显示，vLSR以灰色虚线表示。FIRE-2结果落在DREAMS带内，但后者的散布要大得多。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The top panel shows DM–nucleon spin-independent cross-section limits as a function of fundamental DM mass, m DM m_{DM} , for the XENON1T experiment. The limits are provided for the TNG50-1 result (see also folsom2025darkmattervelocitydistributions ) shown in Figure 5 (red), the emulated rescaled DREAMS result shown in Figure 5 (cyan), and the emulated DREAMS dataset with Varied baryonic physics shown in Figure 2 (dark blue). The curves correspond to the constraint at 90% confidence with 16–84 th uncertainty bands. We also show the SHM result with ρ DM \rho_{DM} varying from 0.3 ​ – ​ 0.6 0.3\text{--}0.6 GeV cm -3 . The bottom panel shows the normalized residual to the SHM at ρ DM = 0.4 ​ GeV ​ cm − 3 \rho_{DM}=0.4{\ GeV\ cm}^{-3} (black). Comparing the red and cyan bands underscores that the simulation resolution can affect sensitivity projections. From low m DM m_{DM} to high m DM m_{DM} , the uncertainty band widths vary from ∼ 0.23 ​ – ​ 0.08 \sim 0.23\text{--}0.08 dex, ∼ 0.19 ​ – ​ 0.06 \sim 0.19\text{--}0.06 dex, and ∼ 0.15 ​ – ​ 0.12 \sim 0.15\text{--}0.12 dex for DREAMS Varied, TNG50-1 rescaled, and DREAMS rescaled, respectively. At low masses, m DM ≲ 10 ​ GeV ​ c − 2 m_{DM}\lesssim 10{\ GeV}\ c^{-2} , the limit for the DREAMS Varied baryonic physics result is weaker compared to the other two datasets as the high-speed tail is suppressed, due to baryonic physics variations, simulation resolution, halo-to-halo variance, and halo mass uncertainty. The DREAMS result falls within the 2 ​ σ 2\sigma XENON1T sensitivity band in xenon_exp .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：上面板显示XENON1T实验中暗物质-核子自旋无关截面极限随基本暗物质质量mDM的变化。极限针对图5中显示的TNG50-1结果（红色）、图5中显示的仿真重新缩放DREAMS结果（青色）以及图2中显示的具有变化重子物理的仿真DREAMS数据集（深蓝色）给出。曲线对应90%置信度下的约束，带有第16-84百分位不确定性带。我们还显示了ρDM从0.3–0.6 GeV cm⁻³变化的SHM结果。下面板显示相对于ρDM = 0.4 GeV cm⁻³（黑色）的SHM的归一化残差。比较红色和青色带强调模拟分辨率可能影响灵敏度预测。从低mDM到高mDM，不确定性带宽度分别约为∼0.23–0.08 dex、∼0.19–0.06 dex和∼0.15–0.12 dex，对应DREAMS变化、TNG50-1重新缩放和DREAMS重新缩放。在低质量mDM ≲ 10 GeV c⁻²时，DREAMS变化重子物理结果的极限比其他两个数据集弱，因为高速尾部受到抑制，这是由于重子物理变化、模拟分辨率、晕间方差和晕质量不确定性。DREAMS结果落在xenon_exp中XENON1T的2σ灵敏度带内。

title: The DESI Single Fiber Lens Search. I. Four Thousand Spectroscopically Selected Galaxy-Galaxy Gravitational Lens Candidates
comment: 31 pages, 13 figures, submitted to ApJ, comments welcome!
summary: We present 4,110 strong gravitational lens candidates, 3,887 of which are new discoveries, selected from a sample of 5,837,154 luminous red galaxies (LRGs) observed with the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI). Candidates are identified via the presence of background ionized oxygen [O II] nebular emission lines in the foreground LRG spectra which may originate from the lensing of higher redshift star-forming galaxies. Using the measured foreground redshift, background redshift, and integrated flux of the background [O II] doublet, we integrate over impact parameters to compute the probability that each candidate is a lens. We expect 53% of candidates to be true lenses with Einstein radii ranging from 0.1'' to 4'', which can be confirmed with high-resolution imaging. Confirmed strong lenses from this sample will form a valuable cosmological dataset, as strong gravitational lensing is the only method to directly measure dark matter halo substructure at cosmological distances. We independently recover the host of the multiply imaged gravitationally lensed type Ia supernova iPTF16geu (Goobar et al. 2017). Monitoring these lenses for future multiply lensed transients will enable a) H0 measurements via time-delay cosmography and b) substructure measurements via flux ratios.

AI.tldr: DESI巡天从580万红移星系中发现了4110个强引力透镜候选体，其中3887个是新发现，通过前景星系光谱中的背景[O II]发射线识别，预计53%为真实透镜，可用于宇宙学研究和暗物质子结构测量。
AI.motivation: 强引力透镜是唯一能直接测量宇宙学距离上暗物质晕子结构的方法，但现有透镜样本数量有限。DESI巡天提供了大规模星系光谱数据，为发现大量新强引力透镜候选体创造了机会。
AI.method: 从DESI观测的580万红移星系中，通过检测前景LRG光谱中背景[O II]电离氧星云发射线来识别透镜候选体。使用测量的前景红移、背景红移和背景[O II]双线积分通量，计算每个候选体是透镜的概率。
AI.result: 发现了4110个强引力透镜候选体，其中3887个是新发现。预计53%的候选体是真实透镜，爱因斯坦半径范围0.1''-4''。独立恢复了多重成像超新星iPTF16geu的宿主星系。
AI.conclusion: 这些强引力透镜候选体经高分辨率成像确认后，将形成宝贵的宇宙学数据集，可用于哈勃常数测量（通过时间延迟宇宙学）和暗物质子结构测量（通过通量比）。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为强引力透镜候选体搜寻，与用户Zotero库中高权重的gravitational lensing、dark matter、lens等关键词高度匹配，且涉及star-forming galaxies，但方法上主要基于DESI光谱选源而非用户常用的JWST/ALMA高分辨率成像或干涉观测，核心作者无重叠，因此评分较高但未达五星。
recommendation.topic_fit: 强引力透镜和暗物质是用户的核心兴趣，论文直接聚焦于引力透镜候选体搜寻，主题匹配度很高。
recommendation.method_fit: 用户库中常用JWST、ALMA等观测手段研究透镜星系，而本文主要基于DESI光谱数据，方法路径有差异，匹配度中等。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者列表中未出现用户库中的核心作者（如Tommaso Treu、G.C. Jones等），作者匹配度低。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文提供了大规模新透镜候选体样本，对宇宙学研究和暗物质子结构测量有重要价值，与用户对强透镜和暗物质的兴趣契合。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了4110个强引力透镜候选体，其中3887个为新发现，这些候选体选自暗能量光谱仪（DESI）观测的5,837,154个发光红星系（LRG）样本。候选体通过前景LRG光谱中背景电离氧[O II]星云发射线的存在来识别，这些发射线可能源于更高红移的恒星形成星系的透镜效应。利用测量的前景红移、背景红移以及背景[O II]双线的积分通量，我们通过积分碰撞参数计算每个候选体是透镜的概率。预计53%的候选体是真正的透镜，其爱因斯坦半径范围为0.1角秒至4角秒，可通过高分辨率成像确认。该样本中确认的强透镜将形成宝贵的宇宙学数据集，因为强引力透镜是唯一能直接测量宇宙学距离上暗物质晕子结构的方法。我们独立恢复了多重成像引力透镜型Ia超新星iPTF16geu（Goobar等人，2017）的宿主星系。监测这些透镜以寻找未来的多重透镜瞬变现象，将能够实现：a）通过时间延迟宇宙学测量哈勃常数，以及b）通过通量比测量子结构。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些强引力透镜候选体经高分辨率成像确认后，将形成宝贵的宇宙学数据集，可用于哈勃常数测量（通过时间延迟宇宙学）和暗物质子结构测量（通过通量比）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of luminous red galaxy (LRG) redshifts ( z LRG z_{\text{LRG}} ) observed in dark time included in the DESI Data Release 2 (DR2). Densities are calculated using a Gaussian density kernel estimator with a bandwidth factor of 0.1. We search this sample of 5,837,154 spectra for lenses.

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Distribution of foreground ( Redrock best fit) and background (determined by the secondary [O ii] doublet) redshifts for lens candidates. The solid black line indicates where z FG = z BG z_{\text{FG}}=z_{\text{BG}} . Spectra of interest remaining after the secondary MCMC fit and cuts are applied (end of Phase 2). Several linear streak-like features are apparent in the z BG z_{\text{BG}} vs. z FG z_{\text{FG}} distribution. These contaminants are largely due to rare emission lines in the foreground LRG spectrum which are badly fit by Redrock , as indicated by their colors and labels. Sources with z FG < 0.005 z_{\text{FG}}<0.005 are likely M stars blended with faint galaxies. We remove these contaminants (Phase 3). The remaining 4,110 sources plotted here form the lens candidate catalog (dark blue). The side panels show histogram distributions of the 4,110 candidates’ foreground and background redshifts.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：透镜候选体的前景（Redrock最佳拟合）和背景（由次级[O II]双线确定）红移分布。实黑线表示z_FG = z_BG。经过次级MCMC拟合和切割后（第二阶段结束）保留的感兴趣光谱。在z_BG与z_FG分布中可见几条线性条纹状特征。这些污染主要源于前景LRG光谱中罕见的发射线，这些发射线未被Redrock很好地拟合，如其颜色和标签所示。z_FG < 0.005的源可能是与暗弱星系混合的M星。我们移除这些污染（第三阶段）。此处绘制的剩余4110个源构成透镜候选体星表（深蓝色）。侧面板显示了4110个候选体的前景和背景红移的直方图分布。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Description of common emission lines which may not be perfectly fit by Redrock in the foreground galaxy’s spectrum. All wavelengths are given in rest-frame vacuum wavelengths. We apply masks around these foreground lines by setting the inverse variance to 0 within the reported full width for each line (column 3) centered on the line wavelength (column 2). This reduces the number of false positive lens candidates selected by the pipeline.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：在前景星系光谱中可能未被Redrock完美拟合的常见发射线描述。所有波长均以静止帧真空波长给出。我们通过将每条线报告的全宽（第3列）内以线波长（第2列）为中心的逆方差设为0，来在这些前景线周围应用掩模。这减少了管道选择的假阳性透镜候选体数量。

For each candidate, we report the system name, on-sky position, foreground lens redshift ( z FG z_{\text{FG}} ), background source redshift ( z BG z_{\text{BG}} ), Einstein radius ( θ E \theta_{\text{E}} , which we calculate in Section VI.1 ), lensing probability ( p L p_{\text{L}} , a value between 0 and 1, also calculated in Section VI.1 ), and best-fit amplitudes for the 3727Å and 3729Å lines of the [O ii] doublet ( a 1 a_{1} and a 2 a_{2} , respectively).
figures.caption_zh: 表2：包含在我们星表中的候选体子样本及其特征。对于每个候选体，我们报告系统名称、天球位置、前景透镜红移（z_FG）、背景源红移（z_BG）、爱因斯坦半径（θ_E，我们在第六节第一部分计算）、透镜概率（p_L，介于0和1之间的值，也在第六节第一部分计算），以及[O II]双线3727Å和3729Å线的最佳拟合振幅（分别为a_1和a_2）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Panel 1/5. Examples of lens candidates, selected at random from among the full sample of 4,110 candidates. Left: The smoothed LRG spectrum (gray) and Redrock best fit model spectrum (black) are overplotted. The wavelength of the background [O ii] λ ​ λ ​ 3727 \lambda\lambda 3727 doublet identified in the spectrum is indicated by a vertical black line up from the x-axis. The foreground LRG redshift ( z FG z_{\text{FG}} ) and background [O ii] doublet redshift ( z BG z_{\text{BG}} ) are shown in the upper left corner. Center: Zoom on the background [O ii] doublet identified in the LRG spectrum (gray), with our best fit MCMC result (black) and Redrock best fit errors (green). title: The MALATANG survey: star formation, dense gas, and AGN feedback in NGC 1068
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: We aim to investigate the interplay between dense molecular gas, star formation, and active galactic nucleus (AGN) feedback in the luminous infrared galaxy (LIRG) NGC 1068 at sub-kiloparsec scales. We present the HCN (4-3) and HCO$^+$ (4-3) maps of NGC 1068, obtained with JCMT as part of the Mapping the dense molecular gas in the strongest star-forming galaxies (MALATANG) project, and perform spatially resolved analyses of their correlations with infrared luminosity and soft X-ray emission. Spatially resolved relations between the luminosities of infrared dust emission and dense molecular gas tracers ($L_{\rm IR}-L'_{\rm dense}$) are found to be nearly linear, without clear evidence of excess contributions from AGN activity. The spatially resolved X-ray emission ($L^{\rm gas}_{0.5-2\,\mathrm{keV}}$) displays a radially-dependent twofold correlation with the star formation rate (SFR), suggesting distinct gas-heating mechanisms between the galaxy center and the outer regions. A super-linear scaling is obtained in galactic center regions with SFR surface density ($Σ_{\rm SFR}$) $>$ 8.2 $\times$ 10$^{-6}$ $M_\odot$ yr$^{-1}$ kpc$^{-2}$: log($L^{\rm gas}_{0.5-2\,\mathrm{keV}}$/erg s$^{-1}$) = 2.2 log(SFR/$M_\odot$ yr$^{-1}$) + 39.1. We further found a statistically significant super-linear correlation ($β= 1.34$ $\pm$ 0.86) between $L^{\rm gas}_{0.5-2\,\mathrm{keV}}$/SFR and HCN(4-3)/CO(1-0) intensity ratio, whereas no such trend is seen for HCO$^+$(4-3)/CO(1-0) or CO(3-2)/CO(1-0). These findings indicate that AGN feedback does not dominate star formation regulation on sub-kiloparsec scales, and that the excitation of dense gas traced by HCN (4-3) may be more directly influenced by high-energy feedback processes compared to HCO$^+$ (4-3) and CO (3-2).

title: Testing warm dark matter with kinematics of the smallest galaxies
summary: Every dark matter halo forms with a $ρ\propto r^{-1.5}$ density cusp at its center. For warm dark matter (WDM), these prompt cusps can be massive enough to influence the kinematics of dwarf galaxies. By implementing prompt cusps in the Galacticus galaxy formation model, we show that the measured velocity dispersions of Tucana V and Triangulum II are serious outliers for dwarf galaxies arising in WDM models. For thermal-relic dark matter, the three faintest Milky Way satellites together constrain the particle mass to be $m_χ>5.8$ keV at 95 percent confidence or $m_χ>9.4$ keV at 90 percent confidence. Improved velocity dispersion measurements for these systems could greatly refine this constraint, as could identification and kinematic characterization of more such galaxies.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 每个暗物质晕在其中心形成一个密度轮廓为ρ∝r^{-1.5}的尖峰。对于暖暗物质（WDM），这些即时尖峰可能足够大，足以影响矮星系的运动学。通过在Galacticus星系形成模型中实现即时尖峰，我们表明，对于暖暗物质模型中产生的矮星系，Tucana V和Triangulum II的测量速度弥散度是严重的异常值。对于热遗迹暗物质，三个最暗的银河系卫星共同将粒子质量约束在95%置信度下m_χ>5.8 keV，或90%置信度下m_χ>9.4 keV。改进这些系统的速度弥散度测量，以及识别和运动学表征更多此类星系，可以极大地完善这一约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，暖暗物质模型中的“即时尖峰”对矮星系动力学有重要影响，现有观测数据对暖暗物质粒子质量给出了强约束，改进速度弥散度测量和发现更多类似星系可进一步细化约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Illustration of the analysis in this work. title: ELG$\times$LRG distribution through dark matter halo dynamics
summary: We investigate the clustering and halo occupation distribution (HOD) of DESI Y1 emission-line (ELGs) and luminous red (LRGs) galaxies at $0.8<z<1.1$, including their cross-correlation (ELG$\times$LRG), using the AbacusSummit suite and a new Halo Occupation Model (HOMe) for galaxy multi-tracers. This integrates intra-halo dynamics, halo exclusion, and quenching, bridging insights from hydrodynamical, HOD, abundance-matching, and semi-analytic studies. Leveraging full phase-space information from the Uchuu N-body simulation, and sampling satellites from dark-matter particle positions via physically motivated prescriptions, HOMe reproduces the anisotropic clustering down to $s=200\,h^{-1}$kpc with unprecedented accuracy. Model parameters are inferred solely from two-point statistics using a two-level Bayesian framework, yielding high-fidelity ELG, LRG and cross-reference catalogs. We find that satellite ELGs behave as incoherent flows within their parent halos, dominating the clustering below $4\,h^{-1}$Mpc. The HOD from the best-fit HOMe has the following properties: (i) 90.50% (85.91%) of ELGs (LRGs) are central galaxies without satellites, residing in halos of $M_{\rm vir}\sim6.6\times10^{11}\,(1.2\times10^{13})\,h^{-1}{\rm M}_\odot$; (ii) the ELG$\times$LRG cross-correlation is governed by central-central pairs and shaped by halo exclusion on $2-5\,h^{-1}$Mpc scales; (iii) 9.50% (14.09%) of ELGs (LRGs) are satellites, of which 1.09% (3.52%) inhabit halos with a central galaxy of the same species in a maximally conformal configuration, 7.02% (0.005%) orbit complementary hosts in a minimally conformal state, and 0.58% (10.57%) are orphans. HOMe high sensitivity precisely captures the dynamics of satellites in different host environments, opening a promising avenue for understanding systematics, the dynamical nature of dark matter, potentially distinguishing gravity models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了DESI Y1发射线星系和亮红星系在红移0.8-1.1范围内的聚类特性，开发了新的多示踪器晕占据模型HOMe，该模型整合了晕内动力学、晕排除和淬灭效应，能精确再现小尺度各向异性聚类。
AI.motivation: 需要更精确地理解发射线星系和亮红星系的聚类特性和晕占据分布，特别是它们之间的交叉关联，以更好地约束星系形成模型和宇宙学参数。
AI.method: 使用AbacusSummit模拟套件和新的多示踪器晕占据模型HOMe，整合了晕内动力学、晕排除和淬灭效应。利用Uchuu N体模拟的全相空间信息，通过物理驱动的处方从暗物质粒子位置采样卫星星系。
AI.result: HOMe模型能以前所未有的精度再现小至200h^{-1}kpc尺度的各向异性聚类。发现卫星ELGs表现为晕内的非相干流动，主导了4h^{-1}Mpc以下的聚类。最佳拟合HOMe的HOD显示：90.50%的ELGs和85.91%的LRGs是中心星系，分别居住在约6.6×10^{11}和1.2×10^{13}h^{-1}M⊙的晕中。
AI.conclusion: HOMe模型的高灵敏度能精确捕捉不同宿主环境中卫星星系的动力学特性，为理解系统误差、暗物质的动力学性质以及区分不同引力模型开辟了有前景的新途径。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用AbacusSummit模拟套件和一种新的多示踪体晕模型（HOMe），研究了DESI Y1发射线星系（ELGs）和亮红星系（LRGs）在红移0.8<z<1.1范围内的成团性和晕占有分布（HOD），包括它们的交叉关联（ELG×LRG）。该模型整合了晕内动力学、晕排除和熄灭效应，融合了来自流体动力学、HOD、丰度匹配和半解析研究的见解。通过利用Uchuu N体模拟的全相空间信息，并基于物理动机的规则从暗物质粒子位置采样卫星星系，HOMe以前所未有的精度重现了低至s=200 h⁻¹kpc的各向异性成团性。模型参数仅通过双层次贝叶斯框架从两点统计量推断得出，生成了高保真度的ELG、LRG和交叉参考星表。我们发现，卫星ELG在其母晕内表现为非相干流，主导了低于4 h⁻¹Mpc尺度上的成团性。最佳拟合HOMe的HOD具有以下特性：(i) 90.50%（85.91%）的ELG（LRG）是没有卫星的中心星系，居住在M_vir~6.6×10¹¹（1.2×10¹³）h⁻¹M⊙的晕中；(ii) ELG×LRG交叉关联由中心-中心对主导，并在2-5 h⁻¹Mpc尺度上受晕排除效应影响；(iii) 9.50%（14.09%）的ELG（LRG）是卫星星系，其中1.09%（3.52%）居住在具有相同类型中心星系且处于最大共形构型的晕中，7.02%（0.005%）在最小共形状态下绕转互补宿主，0.58%（10.57%）是孤儿星系。HOMe的高灵敏度精确捕捉了不同宿主环境中卫星星系的动力学，为理解系统误差、暗物质的动力学性质以及区分不同引力模型开辟了有前景的新途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：HOMe模型的高灵敏度能精确捕捉不同宿主环境中卫星星系的动力学特性，为理解系统误差、暗物质的动力学性质以及区分不同引力模型开辟了有前景的新途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Schematic illustration of the Hom e workflow. We start from the AbacusSummit input halo and DM particle catalogs and generate the latent satellite V peak V_{peak} values in level-I inference. In level II, we apply the Hom e HOD prescription to assign satellite positions from DM particles, and the velocity bias model to generate their peculiar motions. Then, we perform galaxy-halo connection via abundance matching, probabilistically assigning ELG/LRG classes to the halos. Just prior to the matching, in the Hom e input catalog we model halo exclusion. We then mimic the environmental quenching of ELG satellites in massive LRG hosts statistically, through the joint occupation condition. Finally, by constraining Hom e physical parameters (37 in total) of our level-II inference, we obtain the high-fidelity mock catalog for DESI multi-tracers.

title: Confronting cosmic shear astrophysical uncertainties: DES Year 3 revisited
summary: Cosmology from weak gravitational lensing has been limited by astrophysical uncertainties in baryonic feedback and intrinsic alignments. By calibrating these effects using external data, we recover non-linear information, achieving a 2% constraint on the clustering amplitude, $S_8$, resulting in a factor of two improvement on the $Λ$CDM constraints relative to the fiducial Dark Energy Survey Year 3 model. The posterior, $S_8=0.832^{+0.013}_{-0.017}$, shifts by $1.5σ$ to higher values, in closer agreement with the cosmic microwave background result for the standard six-parameter $Λ$CDM cosmology. Our approach uses a star-forming 'blue' galaxy sample with intrinsic alignment model parameters calibrated by direct spectroscopic measurements, together with a baryonic feedback model informed by observations of X-ray gas fractions and kinematic Sunyaev-Zel'dovich effect profiles that span a wide range in halo mass and redshift. Our results provide a blueprint for next-generation surveys: leveraging galaxy properties to control intrinsic alignments and external gas probes to calibrate feedback, unlocking a substantial improvement in the precision of weak lensing surveys.

AI.motivation: 弱引力透镜宇宙学受到重子反馈和本征排列等天体物理不确定性的限制，需要开发新方法来校准这些效应以恢复非线性信息。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 弱引力透镜宇宙学一直受到重子反馈和本征排列等天体物理不确定性的限制。通过利用外部数据校准这些效应，我们恢复了非线性信息，将聚簇振幅$S_8$的约束精度提升至2%，相较于暗能量巡天第三年（DES Year 3）的基准模型，对$\Lambda$CDM模型的约束改进了一倍。后验结果为$S_8=0.832^{+0.013}_{-0.017}$，向更高值偏移了$1.5\sigma$，与标准六参数$\Lambda$CDM宇宙学下的宇宙微波背景结果更为一致。我们的方法采用了一个恒星形成的“蓝”星系样本，其本征排列模型参数通过直接光谱测量校准，同时结合了由X射线气体分数和运动学Sunyaev-Zel'dovich效应轮廓观测信息（覆盖广泛的质量和红移范围）的重子反馈模型。我们的结果为下一代巡天提供了蓝图：利用星系特性控制本征排列，借助外部气体探针校准反馈效应，从而显著提高弱引力透镜巡天的精度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该方法为下一代巡天提供了蓝图：利用星系特性控制本征排列，借助外部气体探针校准反馈效应，从而显著提高弱引力透镜巡天的精度。

title: Galactic bars are already mature at Cosmic Noon: bar strength and flatness at z ~ 1.5
comment: Accepted for publication in ApJ; 21 pages, 14 figures
summary: In this work, we explore the nature of $z>1$ galactic bars. Once thought to be highly transient, our results demonstrate otherwise. Our sample consists of nine massive ($>10^{10.5}\,\rm M_{\odot}$) star-forming barred-spiral galaxies at $z_{\rm spec} \sim 1.5$. Using rest-frame near-IR (F444W) JWST/NIRCam imaging, we apply ellipse fitting along with 1D and 2D morphological modeling to directly measure bar properties. We find that five galaxies host flat surface brightness profiles (bar Sérsic index $<0.4$), indicative of highly evolved, "mature" bars. By contrast, only two galaxies show exponential profiles, characteristic of young bars, and these are also shorter in absolute length than the flat bars. We therefore conclude that a large fraction of bars at this epoch have already matured, thereby indicating the presence of well-settled disks required to facilitate bar formation and sustained evolution well before $z\sim1.5$. To assess the gravitational impact of the bars, we calculate the maximum transverse-to-radial force ratio ($Q_{b}$). We find that $Q_{b}$ values are comparable to, or weaker than, those of bars in the local Universe, Seven of the nine bars show only a marginal increase in strength with maturity (from exponential to flat bars). Contrarily however, the remaining two bars are flat, but have the lowest $Q_{b}$ values in our sample. We hence propose that the mature bars at $z\sim 1.5$ may experience phases of weakening due to rapid gas inflows and/or minor mergers. In conclusion, our work sheds light on the rapidly evolving nature of high-z bars and paves the way for larger statistical studies.

AI.tldr: 研究发现z~1.5的高红移星系棒已经成熟，表明星系盘在z~1.5之前就已稳定存在，支持棒结构早期形成和持续演化。
AI.motivation: 探索高红移(z>1)星系棒的性质，传统认为这些棒结构是高度瞬态的，但本研究旨在验证这一观点并了解早期宇宙中星系棒的形成和演化过程。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRCam的F444W波段成像，对9个z~1.5、质量>10^10.5 M☉的恒星形成棒旋星系进行椭圆拟合以及1D和2D形态建模，直接测量棒的特性。
AI.result: 9个星系中5个具有平坦的表面亮度分布(棒Sérsic指数<0.4)，表明是高度演化的"成熟"棒；只有2个显示指数型分布，特征为年轻棒。成熟棒在绝对长度上更长。棒的最大横向-径向力比(Qb)与本地宇宙相当或更弱，成熟棒可能经历因快速气体流入和/或小合并导致的减弱阶段。
AI.conclusion: 高红移(z~1.5)星系棒大部分已经成熟，表明星系盘在z~1.5之前就已稳定存在，能够促进棒结构的形成和持续演化。成熟棒可能经历强度减弱阶段，为更大规模的统计研究奠定了基础。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们探索了红移大于1的星系棒的性质。曾经被认为高度瞬变的棒，我们的结果却表明并非如此。我们的样本包含9个在光谱红移约1.5处的大质量（>10^10.5太阳质量）恒星形成棒旋星系。利用静止系近红外（F444W）JWST/NIRCam成像，我们应用椭圆拟合以及一维和二维形态建模来直接测量棒的性质。我们发现5个星系具有平坦的表面亮度分布（棒Sérsic指数<0.4），表明是高度演化的“成熟”棒。相比之下，只有两个星系显示出指数轮廓，这是年轻棒的特征，并且这些棒在绝对长度上也比平坦棒短。因此，我们得出结论，在这个时期，很大一部分棒已经成熟，从而表明在红移约1.5之前就已经存在良好形成的盘，这有助于棒的形成和持续演化。为了评估棒的引力影响，我们计算了最大横向与径向力比（Q_b）。我们发现Q_b值与本地宇宙中的棒相当或更弱。九个棒中有七个仅显示出随成熟度（从指数棒到平坦棒）的边际强度增加。然而，其余两个棒是平坦的，但具有我们样本中最低的Q_b值。因此，我们提出，在红移约1.5处的成熟棒可能由于快速气体流入和/或并合而经历减弱阶段。总之，我们的工作揭示了高红移棒快速演化的性质，并为更大规模的统计研究铺平了道路。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 高红移(z~1.5)星系棒大部分已经成熟，表明星系盘在z~1.5之前就已稳定存在，能够促进棒结构的形成和持续演化。成熟棒可能经历强度减弱阶段，为更大规模的统计研究奠定了基础。

(top right) The ellipticity vs SMA plot. The SMA value at the peak ellipticity is used as the bar length. The exception being ID: 89 (and ID: 1147, not shown), which rather shows a plateau. In this case we select the outer edge of this plateau as the peak since it also corresponds to a change in the position angle (PA) change of > 10 ∘ >10^{\circ} right after the fall of the peak in ellipticity. III.3 (Sec. III.4 ) for comparison. The x-axis gives the radial distance in kpc from the galaxy center. The red dashed lines denote the R bar R_{{bar}} , which is considered the approximate extent of the bar. Hence, the region within these lines contain the majority of the bulge and bar flux. title: Sensitivity of Hongmeng 21cm experiment on scattering dark matter
summary: Scattering between dark matter and baryon can cool intergalactic medium temperature and deepen the 21cm signal. Such interactions have been proposed to explain the unusually deep 21cm absorption signal reported by EDGES in 2018. This paper explores the potential to detect dark matter - baryon scattering with the Hongmeng project, an upcoming lunar orbiting satellite experiment dedicated to measuring global 21cm signal between redshifts $11-46$. We self-consistently forward-model the simulated sky temperature data, jointly varying both the astrophysical and foreground models. We show that even with a very conservative observational strategy in which the experiment only takes data when both the Earth and the Sun are shielded by the Moon, Hongmeng can tighten the current constraints on dark matter - baryon scattering cross-section $σ_0$ by a factor of 21 after the full mission which lasts for five years. The prospective upper limit on $σ_0$ can reach $4 \times 10^{-43} {\rm cm^2}$ for dark matter masses between 0.1 MeV and 0.4 GeV. Even after only one month of observation, a factor of 3 improvement relative to current $σ_0$ limits can be expected.

title: The spectrum of $n_s$ constraints from DESI and CMB data
summary: We present the spectrum of $n_s$ constraints from current CMB data (Planck, ACT, SPT-3G) combined with DESI BAO data, and highlight the interplay of $n_s$ with the optical depth to reionization $τ$. The spectral index $n_s$ of the primordial power spectrum provides a window into early universe, and constraints on $n_s$ play an important role in discriminating early universe models such as models of cosmic inflation. Historically constrained by cosmic microwave background (CMB) experiments, the constraints on $n_s$ shift upward when CMB data is combined with the latest baryon acoustic oscillation (BAO) data from the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI). Recent work explained the origin of this and the relation to the BAO-CMB tension between CMB experiments and DESI BAO, and as a case study presented constraints on $n_s$ from the combination of Atacama Cosmology Telescope (ACT) DR6 data and DESI DR2 data. Here we present constraints from Planck (PR3 and PR4), ACT, the South Pole Telescope (SPT), and the combination of all three CMB experiments, CMB-SPA, with and without DESI DR2 BAO data, and with and without CMB lensing data. In all cases the constraint on $n_s$ is shifted upwards when DESI is included, with the largest shift exhibited by ACT. This is accompanied by a commensurate shift in the constraint on the optical depth to reionization $τ$, which is again greatest for ACT. When CMB data are combined into CMB-SPA and combined with DESI the $n_s$ constraint disfavors at more than $2σ$ the inflation models preferred by Planck alone, such as Higgs, Starobinsky, and exponential $α$-attractors, in favor of other models, such as polynomial $α$-attractors. This work motivates the further study of the tension between CMB and DESI BAO data, and of the rich interplay between $n_s$ and $τ$.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了当前CMB数据（Planck、ACT、SPT-3G）与DESI BAO数据结合对原初功率谱谱指数n_s的约束，重点探讨了n_s与再电离光学深度τ之间的相互影响。研究发现加入DESI数据后n_s约束值向上偏移，这导致某些暴胀模型（如Higgs、Starobinsky、指数α吸引子）在统计上被排除，而支持其他模型（如多项式α吸引子）。
AI.motivation: 研究原初功率谱谱指数n_s的约束对于区分早期宇宙模型（如宇宙暴胀模型）具有重要意义。历史上n_s主要由CMB实验约束，但最新的DESI BAO数据与CMB数据结合后，n_s的约束值出现向上偏移，这种变化及其与τ的关系需要深入研究。
AI.method: 使用多种CMB实验数据（Planck PR3和PR4、ACT DR6、SPT-3G）单独或组合成CMB-SPA，结合DESI DR2 BAO数据，分析n_s的约束。研究考虑了是否包含CMB透镜数据的情况，系统比较了不同数据组合下n_s和τ约束的变化。
AI.result: 在所有情况下，加入DESI数据后n_s的约束值都向上偏移，其中ACT数据的偏移最大。这种偏移伴随着τ约束值的相应变化。当CMB数据组合成CMB-SPA并与DESI结合时，n_s的约束在超过2σ水平上排除了仅由Planck数据偏好的暴胀模型（如Higgs、Starobinsky、指数α吸引子），转而支持其他模型（如多项式α吸引子）。
AI.conclusion: CMB与DESI BAO数据之间的张力需要进一步研究，n_s与τ之间的丰富相互作用值得深入探讨。这些发现对早期宇宙模型的选择具有重要影响，并强调了多数据集联合分析在宇宙学参数约束中的重要性。

title: ALMA-QUARKS: Few-Thousand-Year Hatching out of "Egg": The Supersonic Breakout of a Hypercompact H II Region from Its Parental Hot Core
comment: 18 pages, 14 figures, accepted for publication by ApJ
summary: The kinematic evolution of hypercompact H II (HC H II) regions around young high-mass stars remains poorly understood due to complex interactions with parental environs. We present ALMA QUARKS/ATOMS 1.3 mm/3 mm observations (the highest resolution $\sim0.01$ pc) of a deeply embedded HC H II region (diameter $\sim0.015$ pc, electron density $\sim2\times10^{5}$ cm$^{-3}$) exhibiting a striking $\gtrsim20$ km s$^{-1}$ global redshift seen in optically thin H30$α$/H40$α$ recombination lines relative to its parental hot molecular core within a hub-filament system. The 1.3 mm continuum data reveal a distinct 0.1-pc arc and a perpendicular 0.04-pc tail. We propose that this morphology arises from a dynamic champagne flow: the slow expansion of HC H II region into a pre-existing filament forms the arc and associated low-velocity (few km s$^{-1}$) SiO shocks. Meanwhile, in the opposite direction ionized gas escapes along a steep density gradient traced by the tail and high-velocity (20 km s$^{-1}$) SiO emission. We reject the bow shock scenario in which ionized gas co-moves with a runaway high-mass star because shocked gas in the arc aligns with the hub velocity, contradicting the bow shock prediction. Non-LTE radiative transfer modeling further rules out infall of ionized gas as the velocity shift origin. We conclude that this exceptional HC H II region is undergoing a few-thousand-year transition phase of "hatching out of the egg": the ionized gas of HC H II region has just broken out of its parental hot core and now is flowing outward supersonically. This work highlights how anisotropic density distributions induce supersonically anisotropic ionized flows that govern HC H II region evolution.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA高分辨率观测发现一个超致密H II区正在经历"破壳而出"的过渡阶段，电离气体从母体热分子核中突破并以超音速向外流动。
AI.motivation: 超致密H II区（HC H II）的动力学演化因与母体环境的复杂相互作用而难以理解，需要高分辨率观测来揭示其演化机制。
AI.method: 使用ALMA QUARKS/ATOMS的1.3毫米/3毫米观测（最高分辨率约0.01 pc），分析一个深埋的超致密H II区，结合光学薄H30α/H40α复合线、SiO发射线以及非LTE辐射传输建模。
AI.result: 观测发现该HC H II区呈现显著的全球性红移（>20 km/s），1.3毫米连续谱显示0.1 pc的弧形结构和垂直的0.04 pc尾状结构。弧形结构与低速SiO激波相关，尾状结构与高速SiO发射相关。排除了弓形激波和电离气体下落两种解释。
AI.conclusion: 该HC H II区正处于"破壳而出"的过渡阶段（约数千年），电离气体刚刚突破母体热分子核并以超音速向外流动。各向异性的密度分布导致各向异性的超音速电离流，这主导了HC H II区的演化。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 超致密H II区（HC H II区）围绕年轻大质量恒星的运动学演化，由于与母体环境的复杂相互作用，至今仍知之甚少。我们展示了ALMA QUARKS/ATOMS 1.3 mm/3 mm观测（最高分辨率约0.01 pc）对一个深度嵌入的HC H II区（直径约0.015 pc，电子密度约2×10^5 cm^-3）的研究，该区域在光学薄H30α/H40α复合线中表现出相对于其母体热分子核（位于一个枢纽-纤维系统内）显著的≥20 km s^-1整体红移。1.3 mm连续谱数据揭示了一个明显的0.1 pc弧和一个垂直的0.04 pc尾。我们提出，这种形态源于动态香槟流：HC H II区缓慢膨胀进入预先存在的纤维，形成了弧和相关的低速（几km s^-1）SiO激波。同时，在相反方向，电离气体沿着由尾和高速（20 km s^-1）SiO发射所追踪的陡峭密度梯度逃逸。我们排除了电离气体与流浪大质量星共同运动的弓形激波情景，因为弧中的激波气体与枢纽速度一致，这与弓形激波的预测相矛盾。非LTE辐射传输模型进一步排除了电离气体下落作为速度偏移的起源。我们得出结论，这个特殊的HC H II区正处于一个数千年的过渡阶段，即“破壳而出”：HC H II区的电离气体刚刚突破其母体热分子核，现在正以超音速向外流动。这项工作强调了各向异性密度分布如何诱导各向异性的超音速电离流，从而主导HC H II区的演化。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 该HC H II区正处于"破壳而出"的过渡阶段（约数千年），电离气体刚刚突破母体热分子核并以超音速向外流动。各向异性的密度分布导致各向异性的超音速电离流，这主导了HC H II区的演化。

title: Long-term Mid-infrared Color Variations of Narrow-Line Seyfert 1 Galaxies
comment: Accepted for publication in The Astrophysical Journal
summary: We present a systematic investigation of long-term mid-infrared (MIR) color variability in 1,718 Narrow-Line Seyfert 1 galaxies (NLSy1s) using 14-year \textit{WISE}/NEOWISE monitoring data. Through Pearson correlation analysis between photometric magnitude and color, we identify: (1) a radio-quiet NLSy1 (RQ-NLSy1) population comprising 230 bluer-when-brighter (BWB) sources, 131 redder-when-brighter (RWB) sources, and 1,323 objects showing weak or statistically insignificant color variations; and (2) a radio-loud NLSy1 (RL-NLSy1) population containing 5 BWBs, 2 RWBs, and 27 sources with weak/no color variations. Our analysis reveals that the BWB tendency strengthens significantly in galaxies with redder mean MIR colors $\rm \left<W1-W2\right>$ and lower starlight contamination. Furthermore, this color-change pattern demonstrates that the most bolometric luminous sources exhibit the most pronounced BWB behavior. While similar trends exist for black hole mass and Eddington ratio, bolometric luminosity appears to be the primary physical driver. Potential origins of these variations (e.g., host galaxy contribution, accretion disk variability, and dust reprocessing) are discussed. We conclude that temperature-dependent dust reprocessing dominates the observed BWB, RWB, and no/weak variation patterns. This interpretation may also apply to similar MIR color variations observed in other extragalactic MIR transients, such as tidal disruption events, ambiguous nuclear transients, and changing-look AGNs. In addition, we find no significant difference in long-term MIR color variations between RL-NLSy1s and RQ-NLSy1s, however, RL-NLSy1s show significantly greater dispersion in intrinsic variability amplitude compared to RQ-NLSy1s due to jet-induced complexity, where non-thermal synchrotron emission from relativistic jets obscures thermal dust signatures.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用14年的WISE/NEOWISE监测数据，对1718个窄线赛弗特1星系（NLSy1s）的长期中红外（MIR）颜色变化进行了系统研究。通过光度和颜色之间的皮尔逊相关分析，我们识别出：（1）射电宁静NLSy1（RQ-NLSy1）群体，包括230个变亮变蓝（BWB）源、131个变亮变红（RWB）源和1323个颜色变化微弱或统计上不显著的源；（2）射电响亮NLSy1（RL-NLSy1）群体，包括5个BWB、2个RWB和27个颜色变化微弱或无变化的源。我们的分析揭示，在平均MIR颜色更红（⟨W1−W2⟩）和星光污染更低的星系中，BWB趋势显著增强。此外，这种颜色变化模式表明，最热光度明亮的源表现出最明显的BWB行为。虽然黑洞质量和爱丁顿比率存在类似趋势，但热光度似乎是主要的物理驱动因素。我们讨论了这些变化的潜在起源（例如，宿主星系贡献、吸积盘变率和尘埃再处理）。我们得出结论，温度依赖的尘埃再处理主导了观测到的BWB、RWB和无/弱变化模式。这一解释也可能适用于在其他河外MIR瞬变现象中观测到的类似MIR颜色变化，如潮汐瓦解事件、模糊核瞬变和变脸活动星系核。此外，我们发现RL-NLSy1s和RQ-NLSy1s在长期MIR颜色变化上没有显著差异，然而，由于喷流引起的复杂性，RL-NLSy1s在内在变率幅度上表现出比RQ-NLSy1s更大的离散度，其中相对论性喷流的非热同步辐射掩盖了热尘埃信号。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：温度依赖的尘埃再处理主导观测到的颜色变异性模式，这一解释可能适用于其他河外中红外瞬变现象；射电响亮和射电宁静NLSy1在长期颜色变异性上无显著差异，但射电响亮NLSy1的变异性幅度更大。

title: Reanalyzing DESI DR1: 3. Constraints on Inflation from Galaxy Power Spectra & Bispectra
summary: Models of cosmic inflation generically predict a weak but potentially detectable amount of primordial non-Gaussianity (PNG), which can be used to obtain insights into the degrees of freedom during inflation and their interactions. The simplest types of PNG are the local and non-local (equilateral and orthogonal) shapes of the primordial three-point correlators, which are predicted by models with multiple light fields and derivative interactions in single-field inflation, respectively. In this paper we place constraints on local, equilateral, and orthogonal non-Gaussianities using the power spectrum and bispectrum extracted from first public release of the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI). Our analysis makes use of higher-order clustering information through a consistent effective field theory (EFT) model for both the power spectrum and bispectrum at one-loop order. Using robust scale cuts where the EFT description is valid, we find the following constraints on PNG amplitudes: $f^{\rm loc}_{\rm NL}=-0.1\pm 7.4$, $f^{\rm equil}_{\rm NL}=719\pm 390$, $f^{\rm orth}_{\rm NL}=-200\pm 100$ (at $68\%$ CL). Non-local PNG constraints can be further improved by combining high-redshift DESI with legacy BOSS data and using simulation-based priors on bias parameters, yielding the strongest large-scale structure constraints to date $f^{\rm equil}_{\rm NL}=200\pm 230$, $f^{\rm orth}_{\rm NL}=-24\pm 86$. Our constraint on $f^{\rm loc}_{\rm NL}$ is competitive with the cosmic microwave background (CMB) limit; the combination gives $f^{\rm loc}_{\rm NL}=-0.0\pm 4.1$, $18\%$ stronger than the CMB only result, which represents the strongest bound on multi-field inflation yet obtained.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙暴胀模型普遍预测存在微弱但可探测的原初非高斯性（PNG），这有助于理解暴胀期间的自由度及其相互作用。最简单的PNG类型包括局域、非局域（等边和正交）形状的三点关联函数，分别由多轻场模型和单场暴胀中的导数相互作用预测。本文利用暗能量光谱巡天（DESI）首次公开发布的数据，通过功率谱和双谱对局域、等边和正交非高斯性进行约束。分析采用一致的微扰有效场论（EFT）模型，在单圈阶同时处理功率谱和双谱。在EFT描述有效的稳健尺度截断下，我们得到PNG振幅的约束：$f^{\rm loc}_{\rm NL}=-0.1\pm 7.4$，$f^{\rm equil}_{\rm NL}=719\pm 390$，$f^{\rm orth}_{\rm NL}=-200\pm 100$（68%置信水平）。通过结合高红移DESI与遗留BOSS数据，并采用基于模拟的偏差参数先验，非局域PNG约束进一步改善，得到迄今最强的大尺度结构约束：$f^{\rm equil}_{\rm NL}=200\pm 230$，$f^{\rm orth}_{\rm NL}=-24\pm 86$。对$f^{\rm loc}_{\rm NL}$的约束与宇宙微波背景（CMB）限值相当；两者结合给出$f^{\rm loc}_{\rm NL}=-0.0\pm 4.1$，比仅用CMB的结果强18%，这是迄今为止对多场暴胀的最强约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：DESI数据为原初非高斯性提供了强有力的约束，特别是局域非高斯性约束与CMB相当，结合后得到迄今为止最强的多场暴胀约束，展示了DESI数据在宇宙学参数约束中的强大潜力。

First panel : main results from the galaxy and quasar samples, including the high-redshift quasar sample ‘QSO-all’. Second panel : additional results for local PNG, including splits by tracer population, restricting to the QSO-all power spectrum alone (matching (Chaussidon et al. , 2025 ) ) and adding the Planck PR4 constraints from Jung et al. ( 2025 ) . Third panel : additional results for non-local PNG, including restriction to the tree-level bispectrum ( B tree B_{tree} ), addition of simulation-based priors (SBP), and limiting to high-redshift galaxies (galaxies-hz, or DESI-hz including QSO-all). Unless otherwise stated, we jointly vary f NL equil f_{NL}^{equil} and f NL orth f_{NL}^{orth} , include both the power spectrum and bispectrum, and use conservative priors on EFT parameters.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Constraints on the local PNG amplitude, f NL loc f_{NL}^{loc} , from various combinations of DESI galaxies and quasars. Much of our constraining power comes from the QSO-all power spectrum (which refers to the full DESI catalog up to z max = 3.1 z_{max}=3.1 ), with constraints tightening when adding the bispectrum and other galaxy samples. The full DESI constraint (blue) is close to the CMB bound from Planck ; their combination (red) yields the tightest constraints on f NL loc f_{NL}^{loc} obtained to date. Numerical results are given in Tab. 1 .
